secrets.description: Optional ECDSA private key for the validator wallet that signs claimWin messages. If unset or malformed, wager-signing cleanly disables itself and the rest of the app runs normally — it never blocks the deploy or crashes boot. Staging default is Hardhat account #0.
Deployed WagerEscrow contract address on Usernode EVM chain. Staging uses a placeholder (no real contract).
EVM address receiving the 8% treasury cut of each wager pot.

Optional Redis connection URL used only as a fast path for the PvP matchmaking queue and match timers. The app fully degrades to its built-in Postgres CAS queue when unset, so this is not required to deploy.

Public app-identity key that identifies PuzzleChain to the Usernode dApps-integration surface; returned alongside HMAC-signed integration payloads so callers can attribute them to this app. Public (non-secret); set the production value in Settings → Secrets. Staging uses a well-known Hardhat account #1 address.

Secret app-identity key used to HMAC-sign payloads PuzzleChain sends to the Usernode dApps-integration surface; an empty value disables the integration gracefully. Treated as an opaque HMAC key (any format works). Set the production value in Settings → Secrets. Staging uses a dummy (Hardhat account #1 key).
